---
title: "Robert Forman Horton"
---

## Robert Forman Horton

**Dates:** (18 Sept 1855-30 March 1934)

### Description

theologian

### Biography

A Nonconformist, educated at Shrewsbury and New College, Oxford, he had finished <i>Women of the Old Testament</i> by autumn 1897;  it was evidently published in early 1898 [Horton, <i>An Autobiography</i> WWW]

### Letters

- Letter from December 12, 1896

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
